title: artemisia ludoviciana var. brittonii
intro: Artemisia ludoviciana var. brittonii, also known as Louisiana sagewort or Silver Sage, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Artemisia ludoviciana var. brittonii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
